product_name: Union Bank of India Personal Loan
tagline: Union Personal Loan — For Every Need

interest_rates.note: Rate is determined based on CIBIL score and employment type

eligibility.union_bank_account: Salary account with Union Bank is preferred (faster processing)

work_experience.self_employed: Minimum 2 years in the same profession

special_schemes.name: Union Personal Loan for Pensioners
special_schemes.benefit: Loan up to 18x monthly pension, no income proof needed

special_schemes.name: Union Saral Personal Loan
special_schemes.for: Existing Union Bank customers with good repayment history

special_schemes.name: Union Personal Loan for Defence
special_schemes.for: Indian Army / Navy / Air Force personnel

process_steps.title: Eligibility & Pre-check
process_steps.step_text_hindi: ग्राहक की आयु, आय और सिबिल स्कोर सत्यापित करें। जाँचें कि वेतन खाता यूनियन बैंक में है या नहीं।
process_steps.detail: Verify age, income, and CIBIL score.

process_steps.title: Loan Amount & EMI Calculation
process_steps.step_text_hindi: अधिकतम ऋण = मासिक शुद्ध वेतन का १५ गुना। ईएमआई मासिक आय के ४०-५०% से अधिक नहीं होनी चाहिए।
process_steps.detail: Max loan = 15x monthly net salary. EMI should not exceed 40-50% of income.

process_steps.title: Document Collection
process_steps.step_text_hindi: केवाईसी और आय संबंधी सभी दस्तावेज़ एकत्र करें।

process_steps.title: Submit Application
process_steps.step_text_hindi: शाखा में फ़ॉर्म भरें या ऑनलाइन पोर्टल पर आवेदन जमा करें।
process_steps.detail: Fill form at branch or submit application on online portal

process_steps.title: Verification & Sanction
process_steps.step_text_hindi: रोजगार सत्यापन के बाद स्वीकृति पत्र जारी किया जाएगा।
process_steps.detail: Employment verification followed by sanction letter issuance

process_steps.title: Loan Disbursement
process_steps.step_text_hindi: ऋण राशि सीधे ग्राहक के बचत या चालू खाते में जमा की जाएगी।
process_steps.detail: Loan amount credited directly to customer's savings/current account
process_steps.time: Same day or next working day
